Package org.saidone.repository

Interface DocumentRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Document,String>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Document,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Document,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Document,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Document,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Document>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Document,String>
@Repository public interface DocumentRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Document,String>

    • updateStatus

      @Modifying @Query("update Document d set d.status = :status, d.lastError = :lastError where d.nodeId = :nodeId") void updateStatus(@Param("nodeId") String nodeId, @Param("status") String status, @Param("lastError") String lastError)

    • updateFailedStatus

      @Modifying @Query("update Document d set d.status = :status, d.lastError = :lastError, d.retryCount = d.retryCount + 1 where d.nodeId = :nodeId") void updateFailedStatus(@Param("nodeId") String nodeId, @Param("status") String status, @Param("lastError") String lastError)
